description:
Offered: every semester
Teacher candidates complete the practicum in an inclusive or special education pre-kindergarten to eighth grade setting under the direction of a mentor who is licensed in the area of licensure sought by the candidate and under the guidance of the university supervisor.
Prerequisite(s): Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review
Note: Required for all Special Education: Moderate Disabilities PreK-8 Majors.
Corequisite(s): EDUC 4550
prerequisites: Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review
